ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service plan */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., Fixed Wireless) */,
  "download_speeds" TEXT /* Download speeds offered by the plan */,
  "upload_speeds" REAL /* Upload speeds offered by the plan */,
  "data_cap" TEXT /* Data cap limit for the plan */,
  "price" TEXT /* Pricing structure of the plan, including promotional and regular prices */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service plan */,
  "promotional_price" REAL /* Promotional price of the plan */,
  "regular_price" REAL /* Regular price of the plan after the promotional period */,
  "promotional_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotional period */,
  "promotional_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotional period */,
  "data_limit_exceeded_fee" REAL /* Fee charged if the data cap is exceeded */,
  "setup_fee" REAL /* One-time setup fee for the service plan */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in months */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee charged if the customer terminates the contract early */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service plan the customer is subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the customer subscribed to the plan */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle for the customer (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., residential, business) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "service_address" TEXT /* Service address where the internet service is provided */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer on the service plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES service_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose usage is being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage log entry */,
  "download_usage" REAL /* Amount of data downloaded by the customer */,
  "upload_usage" REAL /* Amount of data uploaded by the customer */,
  "total_data_usage" REAL /* Total data usage by the customer (sum of download and upload) */,
  "peak_hour_usage" REAL /* Amount of data usage during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_hour_usage" REAL /* Amount of data usage during off-peak hours */,
  "overage_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for exceeding the data cap */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
